query: UPDATE users SET subscriptionTier = 'enterprise' WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email LIKE '%clay%' OR email LIKE '%@%' LIMIT 1) LIMIT 1; SELECT id, email, subscriptionTier FROM users WHERE subscriptionTier = 'enterprise' LIMIT 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zhFTwZdMBa685Cr.4d37142b48ab --database FiS5WF2NaftJTm6fu3BYQb --execute UPDATE users SET subscriptionTier = 'enterprise' WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email LIKE '%clay%' OR email LIKE '%@%' LIMIT 1) LIMIT 1; SELECT id, email, subscriptionTier FROM users WHERE subscriptionTier = 'enterprise' LIMIT 1;
